== Notes for [[Item:Q101901|Q101901]] ==

Flint, Shirley Cushing. ''No Mere Shadows: Faces of Widowhood in Early Colonial Mexico''. University of New Mexico Press, Albuquerque, New Mexico, 2013, pages 45-64. … '''Chapter Three: “Doña Luisa de Estrada Challenges Escheatment of Her Encomiendas”''' ... '''married at age 13 in late 1526 or early 1527''' … http://books.google.com/books?id=Ks3ZORm9KlMC&pg=PA14&lpg=PA14&dq=alonso+de+estrada&source=bl&ots=QtXmOGy0uh&sig=TGsWtkIv3AyjMDeWh3dhaLpbLX8&hl=en&sa=X&ei=eHtQVNioHZawyASQ_ILACQ&ved=0CEUQ6AEwBjgK#v=onepage&q=alonso%20de%20estrada&f=false

--------------------
http://www.myheritage.com/research/collection-1/myheritage-family-trees?itemId=131600761-1-165&action=showRecord&indId=externalindividual-8828f7e959fca64ee2af464258673085&mrid=3acbee1ba9ecc459894ae06358332533
----------------------
Hereda la hacienda de Santa Mónica en México
--------------------
* Reference: [https://www.ancestry.com/family-tree/person/tree/11972161/person/232009022461 Ancestry Genealogy] - [https://www.geni.com/projects/SmartCopy/18783 SmartCopy]: ''Sep 12 2018, 16:26:55 UTC''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD922DF01EFBBFA9822EF79916C2467
geni:6000000007847670836

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
